name: Filter
summary: The Filter class creates a filter file based on the input FilterExpression object.

constructors.name: Filter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Filter class.

params.name: FilterExpression
params.doc: The FilterExpression object to be generated.

throws.when: Thrown when a null FilterExpression is specified.

constructors.name: Filter
constructors.signature: public Filter(string FullFileName, IFormatProvider Provider = null)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Filter class.

params.name: FullFileName
params.doc: The filter's full file name to load.

params.name: Provider
params.doc: An object that supports the IFormatProvider interface to correctly parse numbers and dates according to the current culture information. If not provided, the current CultureInfo is used.

throws.when: Thrown when a null FullFileName is specified.

methods.name: CreateFile
methods.signature: public string CreateFile(FilterExpressionFileType FilterExpressionFileType, string FullFileName)
methods.summary: Creates a filter and saves it as a text file.

params.name: FullFileName
params.doc: The full file name of the file to be saved.

returns.doc: A string containing the filter's full file name.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the current FilterExpression as a string.

returns.doc: A string representation of the current FilterExpression.
